name: aid
description: Agent Identity Daemon: shared identity, intent, operation trace, evaluation, and adaptation memory for Codex, Claude Code, and mixed-agent workspaces.

interface.longDescription: AID gives coding agents a shared local ledger for session identity, goals, reads, writes, conditions, outcomes, evaluations, and adaptation hints so Codex and Claude Code can notice each other's traces in mixed-agent work.
defaultPrompt: Show AID awareness for the file I am about to edit.
Use AID to check whether another agent recently touched this file.
